request: Declare + detect + guard-enforce a git workflow topology model: project.json git.workflow_model enum (direct-to-main | github-flow | ask; gitflow/trunk reserved->ask), /init-project best-effort detection (ask on ambiguity), extend git_commit_guard (no 23rd hook) to hard-block commits whose branch contradicts the declared model with a remediation message, Article VII precedence clause (declared model overrides generic branching instincts) + swarm-worktree carve-out, commit SOP + seed.md updates, migrate this repo to direct-to-main.
